name: Cobweb Crawler
flavor: Webs the corridor walls. It's been here longer than the dungeon.
_designNote: Fast and sneaky opener. ♠ suit teaches players ♣ advantage early.

name: Shambling Corpse
flavor: Slow but sturdy. Drops bones and sometimes keys — it used to be someone.
_designNote: Tank intro. ♠ suit, teaches players that undead = key fragments.

name: Dungeon Rat
flavor: Skitters out of nowhere. Annoys more than it threatens.
_designNote: Non-lethal filler. Provides food drops. Teaches players organic = food.

name: Bone Guard
flavor: Armed in life, armed in death. The cellar guards keep their post.
_designNote: Standard combat challenge. ♠ suit — ♣ cards for advantage.

name: Mold Wraith
flavor: Damp walls gave it a body. The spores gave it a grudge.
_designNote: ♣ suit. Teaches ♦ advantage. High awareness makes it a detector.

name: Cave Toad
flavor: Bioluminescent sacs full of something flammable. Don't poke them.
_designNote: ♦ suit intro. ♠ cards for advantage. Organic = food drops.

name: Rot Hound
flavor: Used to guard the lord's estate. Still does, technically.
_designNote: Elite intro. High awareness range — it finds players who thought they were safe.

name: Bone Sovereign
flavor: The cellar remembers a king. The king does not remember being dead.
_designNote: Cellar boss. ♠ suit. Drops guaranteed legendary key fragment + rare card.

name: Soot Imp
flavor: Lives in the furnace vents. Gets annoyed when someone opens a cold room.
_designNote: ♦ suit. ♠ cards for advantage. Organic drops = food.

name: Iron Golem
flavor: Built to haul slag. Still hauling slag. Does not care about you.
_designNote: High HP tank. ♠ suit. Construct = battery drops (high). Slow dex=0.

name: Slag Hound
flavor: Bred in the forges. The heat got into their blood and stayed there.
_designNote: Fast ♦ enemy. ♠ advantage. High stealth for a dog-sized hazard.

name: Clockwork Guard
flavor: Wind-up security. The key in its back is not a vulnerability. Probably.
_designNote: ♣ suit construct. ♦ cards for advantage. Battery drops.

name: Ember Sprite
flavor: Born where sparks land. Dies when you sneeze on it.
_designNote: Glass cannon. Easy to kill with ♠. Fast — dex 3 means it gets there first.

name: Scrap Brute
flavor: Welded together from three failed golems. Angrier than any of them alone.
_designNote: Elite tank. High battery drop rate. No suit — cards deal 1x regardless.

name: Smelt Master
flavor: The foundry's foreman survived its automation. It's very bitter about this.
_designNote: Elite ♦. ♠ cards devastating. Higher awareness — shouts bring others.

name: The Amalgam
flavor: The foundry itself rose up. It wanted to be finished. It always was.
_designNote: Foundry boss. ♦ suit. ♠ decks excel here. High battery + scrap drops.

name: Tide Stalker
flavor: Swam in from a flooded corridor. It prefers it flooded.
_designNote: Fast ♠ marine. ♣ for advantage. Marine drops = relics + currency.

name: Shock Eel
flavor: Coils in the cable conduits. The engineers thought it was wiring.
_designNote: Stealthy ♣ marine. ♦ cards for advantage. High dex + stealth = surprise.

name: Lab Drone
flavor: Research unit repurposed for security. The research was classified.
_designNote: ♣ construct. ♦ advantage. Battery drops. High awareness = early detection.

name: Deep Crawler
flavor: Pulled up from depth. Shell still adjusting to the pressure difference.
_designNote: High HP ♠ brute. ♣ for advantage. Good relic drop source.

name: Brine Wraith
flavor: A researcher who knew too much. The lab sealed the section before anyone noticed.
_designNote: Stealthy ♠ undead. Rare mix — drops key frags. ♣ for advantage.

name: Bio-Hazard Slime
flavor: Lab experiment 7-G. Escaped containment in 2019. Mostly harmless.
_designNote: nonLethal organic. ♦ cards for advantage. Food drops in sealab = rare.

name: Admiralty Enforcer
flavor: The Admiralty's last line. Armored. Loyal. Not asking questions.
_designNote: Elite ♣ marine. ♦ cards. High relic + crystal drop rate.

name: Cryo-Brute
flavor: Cryogenic containment suit filled with something that doesn't like being warm.
_designNote: Elite ♠ construct. ♣ for advantage. Battery + relic drops.

name: The Archivist
flavor: Knows everything the sealab ever logged. Including exactly what you are.
_designNote: Final boss. ♣ suit. ♦ decks excel. Drops unique relic + Admiralty rep bonus.

name: Hero's Shadow
flavor: The Hero left an impression. The dungeon filled it in.
_designNote: Rare random-floor elite. References the Hero's Mess lore. Drops Hero's Dogtag (ITM-063).

name: Wandering Vendor
flavor: Not sure how it got down here. Not sure it knows either. Good prices though.
_designNote: nonLethal. Triggers shop interaction instead of combat. Rare floor spawn.
